pi_items.source: Downloaded official sakila-db.zip from downloads.mysql.com and verified sakila-data.sql contains exactly 1000 film INSERT records.
Confirmed from task description and export_result.sh which validates CSV_PATH.
Confirmed from task description and export_result.sh which queries information_schema for these specific constraint names.
Confirmed from task description and export_result.sh which checks for this specific column in information_schema.COLUMNS.
Confirmed from task description and export_result.sh which checks for this specific function in information_schema.ROUTINES.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official MySQL Sakila sample database. It was verified by downloading sakila-db.zip from downloads.mysql.com that the film table initially contains exactly 1000 records. The task correctly requires exporting the result to /home/ga/Documents/exports/data_integrity_report.csv, creating constraints 'chk_rental_duration' and 'chk_payment_amount', adding column 'price_category', and creating function 'fn_customer_lifetime_value' as specified in the instructions and validated by the task scripts.
